lore: BareBones Coin strips currency down to its essentials:
pure utility, zero hype, maximum efficiency.
Backed by and tied to diamonds.
It's perfect for anyone tired of bloated emeralds.

resultItem.name: Lumberjack
lore: The most famous depiction of a
lumberjack in folklore is Paul Bunyan.
Several towns claim to have been
Paul Bunyan's home and have constructed
statues of Bunyan and his blue ox "Babe".

resultItem.name: Sanctuary
lore: A place of solitude offers a retreat
from the opposing forces and diverse
demands of living an entry into a state
of peace and unity. Mind and body can
retire from confusion and conflict to
a sanctuary of of clarity and harmony.
